headline: U.S. orders staff to leave Saudi Arabia as war spreads; Iran rules out immediate ceasefire
summary: The U.S. ordered non-emergency government staff to leave Saudi Arabia as the widening Iran war rattled global markets.

raw.headline: U.S. orders staff to leave Saudi Arabia as war spreads; Iran rules out immediate ceasefire
raw.summary: The U.S. ordered non-emergency government staff to leave Saudi Arabia as the widening Iran war rattled global markets.

headline: Baker Hughes’ US$10b Debt Raise Targets Energy Transition And AI Power
summary: Baker Hughes (NasdaqGS:BKR) has launched multi currency debt offerings totaling about US$10b. The company plans to use the proceeds to help fund its proposed acquisition of Chart Industries. Baker Hughes has also secured new equipment supply wins in advanced nuclear reactor projects. The company is supplying technology for AI focused data centers that require high intensity power solutions. Baker Hughes, traditionally known for its oilfield services and energy technology, is now tying a...

headline: Iran continues to hit Gulf countries as Israeli strikes intensify; Tehran says new leader appointed
summary: Bahrain and the United Arab Emirates report more strikes on civilian targets as U.S.-Israeli attacks on Iran continue.
